name: Venezuelan Bolívar
description: The Venezuelan Bolívar Soberano is named after independence leader Simón Bolívar. Venezuela holds the world's largest proven oil reserves.
historicalNotes: Venezuela has redenominated its currency multiple times due to hyperinflation. The bolívar soberano was introduced in 2018, removing five zeros. A digital bolívar removed six more zeros in 2021.
